requirement_topic.en: PSQCA Adoption and Compulsory Scope Due Diligence

summary.en: PSQCA publishes ISO/IEC adoption and compulsory-item information, but a blanket approved Pakistan Standard or compulsory PS mark route for every EV charger SKU was not confirmed from the cited public pages. Treat PSQCA status as a due-diligence item tied to the exact product, HS code, tender, importer route, and authority decision.
summary.zh: PSQCA公布ISO/IEC采标和强制项目资料，但从所引公开页面未确认每个电动汽车充电设备SKU均适用的统一巴基斯坦标准批准或强制PS标志路径。应将PSQCA状态作为与具体产品、HS编码、招标、进口商路径和主管机关决定相关的尽调事项。
summary.zht: PSQCA公布ISO／IEC採標和強制項目資料，但從所引公開頁面未確認每個電動汽車充電設備SKU均適用的統一巴基斯坦標準批准或強制PS標誌路徑。應將PSQCA狀態作為與具體產品、HS編碼、招標、進口商路徑和主管機關決定相關的盡調事項。

standards_or_laws: NEPRA Regulatory Framework for Electric Vehicle Charging Stations

summary.en: GB/T 18487.1-2023 and exact GB/T 20234.1-2023 / 20234.2-2015 / 20234.3-2023 reports can support a technical comparison, but they do not prove that PSQCA has adopted the same IEC edition or that PSQCA certification is compulsory for the exact charger.
summary.zh: GB/T 18487.1-2023以及准确GB/T 20234.1-2023/20234.2-2015/20234.3-2023报告可支持技术对比，但不能证明PSQCA已采用相同IEC版本，也不能证明具体充电设备必须进行PSQCA认证。
summary.zht: GB/T 18487.1-2023以及準確GB/T 20234.1-2023／20234.2-2015／20234.3-2023報告可支持技術對比，但不能證明PSQCA已採用相同IEC版本，也不能證明具體充電設備必須進行PSQCA認證。

gap.en: Name the exact Pakistan-approved or project-accepted standard route before making claims. If no specific PSQCA rule can be identified, frame the row as project due diligence rather than mandatory certification.
gap.zh: 在作出声明前，应列明准确的巴基斯坦批准或项目接受标准路径。如不能识别具体PSQCA规则，应将该项表述为项目尽调，而不是强制认证。
gap.zht: 在作出聲明前，應列明準確的巴基斯坦批准或項目接受標準路徑。如不能識別具體PSQCA規則，應將該項表述為項目盡調，而不是強制認證。

mandatory_status.target: Scope-dependent; mandatory only where a Pakistan notification, compulsory-item listing, NEPRA/NEECA/PSQCA approval, customs route, tender, importer condition, utility condition, or project approval calls it up
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T evidence does not determine Pakistan PSQCA compulsory status

source.publisher: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not overclaim PSQCA adoption or compulsory certification without the exact approved Pakistan Standard, edition, and product scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 如无准确的巴基斯坦批准标准、版本和产品范围，不应夸大PSQCA采标或强制认证要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 如無準確的巴基斯坦批准標準、版本和產品範圍，不應誇大PSQCA採標或強制認證要求。

requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851-1 and IEC 62893-1 Evidence Called Up by Project Framework
requirement_topic.zh: 项目框架引用的IEC 61851-1和IEC 62893-1证据
requirement_topic.zht: 項目框架引用的IEC 61851-1和IEC 62893-1證據

summary.en: NEPRA's public EV charging-station framework refers to manufacturer instructions or relevant IEC 61851-1 insulation requirements, and to manufacturer instructions or IEC 62893-1 for charging-station or charging-point power supply cables.
summary.zh: NEPRA公共充电站框架引用制造商说明或相关IEC 61851-1绝缘要求，并要求充电站或充电点供电电缆符合制造商说明或IEC 62893-1。
summary.zht: NEPRA公共充電站框架引用製造商說明或相關IEC 61851-1絕緣要求，並要求充電站或充電點供電電纜符合製造商說明或IEC 62893-1。

standards_or_laws: NEPRA Regulatory Framework for Electric Vehicle Charging Stations

summary.en: GB/T 18487.1-2023 is the China conductive charging system general-requirements baseline. Exact GB/T 20234.1-2023 / 20234.2-2015 / 20234.3-2023 / 20234.4-2023 connector ratings and domestic cable specifications may be useful, but the Pakistan file should map them to the IEC or manufacturer-instruction route required by the project.
summary.zh: GB/T 18487.1-2023是中国传导充电系统通用要求基线。准确GB/T 20234.1-2023/20234.2-2015/20234.3-2023/20234.4-2023接口额定值和国内电缆规格可能有用，但巴基斯坦资料包应将其映射至项目要求的IEC或制造商说明路径。
summary.zht: GB/T 18487.1-2023是中國傳導充電系統通用要求基線。準確GB/T 20234.1-2023／20234.2-2015／20234.3-2023／20234.4-2023接口額定值和國內電纜規格可能有用，但巴基斯坦資料包應將其映射至項目要求的IEC或製造商說明路徑。

gap.en: Prepare an IEC cross-reference table for insulation, protection, control pilot, earthing, abnormal-condition, and cable requirements. Include cable certificates, datasheets, temperature and outdoor ratings, and manufacturer installation instructions.
gap.zh: 应为绝缘、保护、控制导引、接地、异常工况和电缆要求准备IEC交叉引用表。资料包应包括电缆证书、数据表、温度和户外等级以及制造商安装说明。
gap.zht: 應為絕緣、保護、控制導引、接地、異常工況和電纜要求準備IEC交叉引用表。資料包應包括電纜證書、資料表、溫度和戶外等級以及製造商安裝說明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for public EV charging-station installations where the NEPRA framework, utility inspection, or project owner requires this evidence; manufacturer-instruction route may be accepted where the framework allows it
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T evidence is baseline evidence and may need clause mapping or retesting for IEC-labelled Pakistan evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Pakistan public charging files should include IEC or manufacturer-instruction evidence for insulation and cables, not only China GB/T charger reports.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴基斯坦公共充电资料包应包括绝缘和电缆的IEC或制造商说明证据，而不仅是中国GB/T充电设备报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴基斯坦公共充電資料包應包括絕緣和電纜的IEC或製造商說明證據，而不僅是中國GB/T充電設備報告。

requirement_topic.en: Safety Signage, Local-Language Information, Fire, and Building Interface
requirement_topic.zh: 安全标识、当地语言信息、消防和建筑接口
requirement_topic.zht: 安全標識、當地語言資訊、消防和建築接口

summary.en: NEPRA's framework includes safe charging tips, danger and caution signage in Urdu, English, or a language understood locally, fire prevention systems, fire-retardant/self-extinguishing enclosures, and fire detection, alarm, and control systems aligned with manufacturer instructions, Pakistan Building Codes, and national or provincial legal requirements.
summary.zh: NEPRA框架包括安全充电提示、以乌尔都语、英语或当地可理解语言提供的危险和警示标识、消防预防系统、阻燃自熄外壳，以及按制造商说明、巴基斯坦建筑规范和国家或省级法律要求配置的火灾探测、报警和控制系统。
summary.zht: NEPRA框架包括安全充電提示、以烏爾都語、英語或當地可理解語言提供的危險和警示標識、消防預防系統、阻燃自熄外殼，以及按製造商說明、巴基斯坦建築規範和國家或省級法律要求配置的火災探測、警報和控制系統。

standards_or_laws: NEPRA Regulatory Framework for Electric Vehicle Charging Stations

summary.en: GB/T charger evidence and Chinese-language labels do not replace Pakistan site signage, local-language user information, emergency instructions, fire-system design, building-code review, or local fire approval.
summary.zh: GB/T充电设备证据和中文标签不能替代巴基斯坦现场标识、当地语言用户信息、应急说明、消防系统设计、建筑规范审查或当地消防批准。
summary.zht: GB/T充電設備證據和中文標籤不能替代巴基斯坦現場標識、當地語言用戶資訊、應急說明、消防系統設計、建築規範審查或當地消防批准。

gap.en: Localise cabinet labels, mobile-app warnings, emergency shutdown instructions, safe-charging tips, operator training, fire-retardant material evidence, fire detection and alarm design, and site approval records.
gap.zh: 应本地化柜体标签、移动应用警示、紧急停机说明、安全充电提示和运营商培训，并准备阻燃材料证据、火灾探测和报警设计以及现场批准记录。
gap.zht: 應本地化櫃體標籤、行動應用警示、緊急停機說明、安全充電提示和營運商培訓，並準備阻燃材料證據、火災探測和警報設計以及現場批准記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for public EV charging-station installations where the NEPRA framework and applicable building or fire requirements apply
mandatory_status.cn: China product and label evidence is not sufficient for Pakistan site signage or fire/building compliance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Pakistan EV charger deployment needs local-language safety materials and site fire/building evidence in addition to product tests.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴基斯坦充电设备部署除产品测试外，还需要当地语言安全材料以及现场消防/建筑证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴基斯坦充電設備部署除產品測試外，還需要當地語言安全材料以及現場消防／建築證據。
